retry_reason: Failure (NULL return) indicates invalid handle; retrying the same handle will not succeed unless the object is later created, which is uncommon in normal usage.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that looks up an armada_gem_object by its DRM handle, acquires a reference (via drm_gem_object_lookup), and returns the object pointer. The caller now owns a reference and must release it (e.g., via drm_gem_object_put) when done. If the handle is invalid or the object not found, returns NULL and no reference is taken.
